caption: A man with a beard, wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap, and large over-ear headphones, sits in a podcast studio. He wears a gold chain necklace and is positioned behind a professional microphone. Behind him is a white wall featuring repeating logos that include the word "HUSTLE" and a row of five stars. A large red and black logo reading "BOSS TALK 101" is visible in the background and appears again as an on-screen graphic in the lower corners. The man's t-shirt has the text "CHECK IT!" printed across the chest. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated, shifting his head slightly and blinking as he looks toward someone off-camera. He maintains a serious expression while listening or preparing to speak, with the camera remaining in a static medium shot.
